headline: Exclusive-Meta targets May 20 for first wave of layoffs; additional cuts later in 2026
summary: Meta intends to conduct a first wave of sweeping layoffs planned for this year on May 20, with more coming later, three sources ‌familiar with the plans told Reuters.  The Facebook and Instagram owner will lay off about 10% of its global ‌workforce, or close to 8,000 employees, in that initial round, one of the sources said.  The company is planning further layoffs in the second half of ​the year, the three sources said, although details of those cuts, including date and size, were not yet settled.

headline: AI demand metrics are broken and only Anthropic is being realistic
summary: The main demand signal for AI looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated. Token consumption, the basic unit of AI usage, is becoming a distorted metric. Companies have created "tokenmaxxing" leaderboards that track how many tokens employees use. Token demand is what the entire AI investment cycle is built on. CNBC's Deirdre Bosa shares her perspective on why Anthropic, by changing how it prices its tools, might be the best positioned AI company if a correction comes.

raw.headline: AI demand metrics are broken and only Anthropic is being realistic
raw.summary: The main demand signal for AI looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated. Token consumption, the basic unit of AI usage, is becoming a distorted metric. Companies have created "tokenmaxxing" leaderboards that track how many tokens employees use. Token demand is what the entire AI investment cycle is built on. CNBC's Deirdre Bosa shares her perspective on why Anthropic, by changing how it prices its tools, might be the best positioned AI company if a correction comes.

headline: European Action On WhatsApp AI Access Tests Meta’s Monetization Plans
summary: The European Commission is preparing interim measures that target Meta Platforms' policies for WhatsApp access by AI services. The Commission may order Meta to reinstate earlier terms, which could affect how WhatsApp Business is monetized in the region.
